name: understate-server
description: UNDERSTATE - Multiplayer City & State Simulation Server

scripts.lint: node --check server/main.js server/routes/*.js server/auth/*.js server/middleware/*.js 2>&1 | head -20
scripts.android:sync: npm run android:prepare && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:sync && npx cap build android
scripts.android:run: npm run android:sync && npx cap run android
